themes.exampleQuote: Always reliable for chicken katsu or beef bulgogi bowls
Easy fast hole in the wall with delicious food
Perfect for lunch with enough for a snack later that night
Four little circle containers of unusual sauces and not told what any of them were
Very delicious quiet spot for Korean style bowls

notable_quote: Easy fast hole in the wall with delicious food — perfect for lunch with enough for a snack later that night.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers return for the katsu and bulgogi bowls specifically, praising consistency and portion size, but a recurring undercurrent around front-of-house terseness and unexplained accompaniments keeps the sentiment signal from matching the five-star volume.
quarter_narrative: Oishii Donburi entered Spring 2026 with 385 Google reviews, an 84% five-star share, and a photo catalog pushing 342 images — a steady accumulation that says the regulars keep showing up even if they're not posting about it. What the business did not do was touch Instagram: zero posts and zero reels in 30 days, with the last post landing 68 days before the quarter closed and an engagement rate that reflects that dormancy. Across the Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens family, Mola took the top position on the strength of creator collaboration momentum — a signal Oishii has the raw material to chase, with a creator fit reading that already meets the family median. Moving up from Ones to Watch requires the Instagram signal to show a pulse; the Google foundation is already laid.
tldr_read: Solid Google footprint, completely dormant Instagram. Ones to Watch — #1 in Pittsburgh Japanese Restaurants.
tldr_meaning: The Google axis is built; the Instagram axis has been off for over two months, and until it restarts, the creator fit potential sitting at the family median has nowhere to land.

playbook.headline: End the 68-day Instagram silence
playbook.action: Post at minimum one Reel of the katsudon or bulgogi bowl — the two dishes named most in reviews — to restart the engagement clock.

playbook.headline: Label the sauces, on the tray and online
playbook.action: One recurring Google photo or Story explaining the sauce pairings addresses the clearest negative theme in reviews and fills a gap in the 342-image catalog.

playbook.headline: Connect with one Lawrenceville food creator
playbook.action: Creator fit already meets the family median — one hosted visit converts that latent signal into Reels reach without building anything from scratch.
